tasks.title: Add module docstrings to apperrors files
evidence: internal/apperrors/apperrors.go begins with `package apperrors` and has no file-level docstring.
internal/apperrors/sanitize.go and internal/apperrors/sentinels.go also start with package declarations without docstrings.
plan: Add top-of-file docstrings describing responsibilities, non-goals, and invariants.
Ensure docstrings align with AGENTS.md requirements for every code file.

tasks.title: Add module docstrings to jobs and manage CLI files
evidence: internal/jobs/job_create.go, job_run.go, and helpers.go start with package declarations without file-level docstrings.
internal/cli/manage/pipeline_js_mgmt.go and render_profiles.go start with package declarations without docstrings.
plan: Add file docstrings documenting responsibility, non-goals, and invariants for each listed file.
Keep docstrings concise and aligned with AGENTS.md expectations.
